issue.title: Coordinate Factory Safe Integrator v1 execution

metadata.draft_policy: deterministic checks only; unresolved subjective criteria must stay in manual_review

acceptance: The operator plan is saved at workspace/runs/coordination/factory-integration-v1/factory-safe-integrator-plan.md.
A Factory Safe Integrator coordination issue exists in Taskstream with package factory-integration-v1.
Execution remains safe by default: no live worker dispatch, no automatic merge to main, no silent Taskstream Done transitions, and no high-fanout increase.
Coordinator produces a child-task creation plan before any implementation dispatch.
Agent Manager preflight is reviewed before any future dispatch and blocks on critical findings.
scope.goal: Coordinate the safe, no-model scheduling and execution plan for Factory Safe Integrator v1. Create or verify child work only through manifests, keep live dispatch disabled by default, and require deterministic validation before any worker execution.
